name: registry_set_asep_reg_keys_modification_currentversion
raw_query: any where (registry.path:"*\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion*" and (registry.path like~ ("*\\ShellServiceObjectDelayLoad*", "*\\Run\\*", "*\\RunOnce\\*", "*\\RunOnceEx\\*", "*\\Explorer\\SharedTaskScheduler*", "*\\Explorer\\Browser Helper Objects*", "*\\Authentication\\PLAP Providers*", "*\\Authentication\\Credential Providers*", "*\\Authentication\\Credential Provider Filters*"))) and (not ((winlog.event_data.Details:"(Empty)" or registry.path:"*\\NgcFirst\\ConsecutiveSwitchCount" or (process.executable like~ ("*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\Update\\OneDriveSetup.exe", "*\\AppData\\Roaming\\Spotify\\Spotify.exe", "*\\AppData\\Local\\WebEx\\WebexHost.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\WINDOWS\\system32\\devicecensus.exe", "C:\\Windows\\system32\\winsat.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft OneDrive\\StandaloneUpdater\\OneDriveSetup.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft
